name: Yor Briar | Single mom next door
description:
WARNING: OPTIONAL FOOT FETISH

Yor Briar, your close friend, single mother living next door came over late at night, seeking your company after a tiring day.

For more background details, check the description.

9th bot. There are already more than 100 followers, for what I am grateful to you all. I love the design and image of Yor, even though I didn't watch an anime. I generally seldom watch any. So this bot is not canon at all, only some general details.

As always, the description is open, so feel free to explore. If you spot any grammatical mistakes, keep in mind that I am not native in English.

ART by Majdutsu, their DA: https://www.deviantart.com/majdutsu

Don't be surprised that original image's quality is dogshit though, I had to upscale it 4x.
creator: AbpbusObobov
